seo.title: Deep Joshi - CV
seo.description: Resume of Deep Joshi, Undergraduate Researcher at Nirma University specializing in Green AI, Computer Vision, and Federated Learning.

person.quote: “I dive into what I’m not good at—because the easy stuff doesn’t ignite my spirit.”

availability: Open to research collaborations, internships, and technical leadership roles.

items.org: IEEE Computer Society · Nirma University Chapter
items.desc: Directing chapter technical initiatives and mentoring project teams across AI and systems domains. Coordinating external collaborations including speaker engagements and workshops.
An evaluation framework that ranks AI models by both utility and compute cost, surfacing performance-efficiency trade-offs and identifying diminishing returns from scale.

items.org: IEEE CS Chapter Initiative · Technical Lead
items.desc: Leading technical execution for an IEEE CS initiative exploring agentic AI workflows for research automation and student-led innovation.

items.role: FedQ-Fraud: A Quantum-Enforced Federated Learning Framework for Financial Fraud Detection
items.desc: Research detailing a federated learning approach for financial fraud detection, incorporating quantum-enforced privacy guarantees across distributed banking nodes.
